title: Re-discovery of the libation formula family from ritual corpus structure
primary_finding: A ritual-exclusive formula family is re-discovered around a-ta-i-*301-wa-ja, commonly extended by ja-sa-sa-ra-me and less often by i-da-ma-te.
related_findings: a-ta-i-*301-wa-ja appears in 21 ritual documents and 0 non-ritual documents
a-ta-i-*301-wa-ja ja-sa-sa-ra-me is the strongest repeated ritual bigram
a-ta-i-*301-wa-ja ja-sa-sa-ra-me i-da-ma-te recurs as a longer extension tier
